chants.title: One Nil to the Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
chants.tuneName: Go West (Pet Shop Boys / Village People)
chants.contextNotes: Sung when leading 1-0. One of the most recognisable Arsenal chants.

chants.title: 49 Undefeated
chants.lyrics:
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Forty-nine, forty-nine I say
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Playing football the Arsenal way

chants.title: Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
chants.lyrics:
And I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I la-la-like it,
La-la, like it,
Here we go, oh!
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe!
chants.contextNotes: Started when Saka and Smith Rowe broke through together. Still sung for Saka.

chants.title: Super Mik Arteta
chants.lyrics:
We've got Super Mik Arteta,
He knows exactly what we need;
Kieran at the back, Gabi in attack,
Arsenal on the way to Champions League!
chants.contextNotes: A tribute to manager Mikel Arteta.

variations.label: Current version
variations.lyric: Gabi at the back, Gabi in attack
variations.contextNote: Kieran Tierney left, so fans swapped his name out. Arsenal have had three Brazilian Gabriels, which makes the line land.

chants.title: Gabriel, King of Brazil
chants.lyrics:
You'll fall in love, I know you will,
Our number 6 is the King of Brazil!
Our centre half, he'll give you hell,
Our wall at the back is Gabriel.
Ole, ole, ole, ola!
chants.tuneName: You'll Fall in Love, I Know You Will
chants.contextNotes: For Brazilian centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes, who wears number 6.

chants.title: Saliba
chants.lyrics:
Do do do do do do do do,
Do do do do do do,
Owowohhooo, SALIBA!
Do do do do do do do do,
Do do do do do do,
Owowohhooo, SALIBA!
chants.contextNotes: For defender William Saliba, sung to the riff from 'Tequila'.

chants.title: Kai Havertz Scores Again
chants.lyrics:
Tsamina mina, eh eh,
Waka waka, eh eh,
60 million down the drain,
Kai Havertz scores again!
chants.contextNotes: Set to Shakira's 'Waka Waka'. The 60 million line pokes fun at his transfer fee.

chants.title: 49 49 Lewis-Skelly
chants.lyrics:
49, 49, Lewis-Skelly,
49, 49, I say,
49, 49, Lewis-Skelly,
Playing football the Arsenal way!
chants.tuneName: Give Me Oil in My Lamp
chants.contextNotes: Adapted from the '49 Undefeated' chant; here the 49 is Myles Lewis-Skelly's shirt number.

chants.title: Eze (F**k off Tottenham)
chants.lyrics:
We can hear them crying at the Lane,
Eberechi scores again!
One chat with Mik Arteta he said 'wow',
F**k off Tottenham, I'm a Gooner now!
Na na na na na na na naaa na naaaa
chants.contextNotes: Debuted in August 2025 after Arsenal signed Eze ahead of Tottenham. The crying at the Lane line mocks Spurs fans.

chants.title: Odegaard (Our Number 8)
chants.lyrics:
Been dreaming all day
Of our number 8
Martin Odegaard, oi oi oi!
When he's on the ball
He's f**king magical
Martin Odegaard, oi oi oi!
chants.contextNotes: For club captain Martin Odegaard, Arsenal's number 8.

chants.title: Zubimendi (Last Christmas)
chants.lyrics:
Last Christmas, I gave you my heart,
But the very next day, you gave it away.
This year, to save me from tears,
I'll give it to Zubimendi.
chants.contextNotes: A festive chant for midfielder Martin Zubimendi, sung to Wham!'s Last Christmas. Only the closing words change.

chants.title: Allez Allez Allez
chants.lyrics:
We won the league at Anfield,
We won it at the lane,
Stamford Bridge, Old Trafford,
No one can say the same,
Mikel Arteta's army,
We're Arsenal through and through,
We'll sing it in the North Bank,
And in the Clock End too.
Allez Allez Allez,
Allez Allez Allez,
Allez Allez Allez,
Allez Allez Allez...
